children.heading: Demand responsive system
children.label: 1 Demand responsive system
children.text: The term “demand responsive system” means any system of providing designated public transportation which is not a fixed route system.

children.heading: Designated public transportation
children.label: 2 Designated public transportation
children.text: The term “designated public transportation” means transportation (other than public school transportation) by bus, rail, or any other conveyance (other than transportation by aircraft or intercity or commuter rail transportation (as defined in )) that provides the general public with general or special service (including charter service) on a regular and continuing basis.section 12161 of this title

children.heading: Fixed route system
children.label: 3 Fixed route system
children.text: The term “fixed route system” means a system of providing designated public transportation on which a vehicle is operated along a prescribed route according to a fixed schedule.

children.heading: Operates
children.label: 4 Operates
children.text: The term “operates”, as used with respect to a fixed route system or demand responsive system, includes operation of such system by a person under a contractual or other arrangement or relationship with a public entity.

children.heading: Public school transportation
children.label: 5 Public school transportation
children.text: The term “public school transportation” means transportation by schoolbus vehicles of schoolchildren, personnel, and equipment to and from a public elementary or secondary school and school-related activities.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 6 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Transportation.
